channel.title: Vortex Gaming Hub
channel.description: Recent content on Vortex Gaming Hub

item.title: How to Fix Lag in Valorant
item.description: Lag can be the difference between a headshot and a whiff. Follow these steps to optimize your network and PC settings for Valorant. 1. Network Settings Use a wired connection (Ethernet). Disable “Network Buffering” in game settings. 2. PC Optimization Turn on “Nvidia Reflex Low Latency”. Set your power plan to “High Performance”.
